meta_title: Removals Reigate | Moving Home in Surrey
meta_description: Mark Ratcliffe Moving offer a complete moving and storage service to clients across Reigate and Surrey. Having worked in the industry for more than 30 years, we provide a local & national removals service to clients in Reigate, Redhill and across Surrey.
intro_paragraph: When choosing a removal firm for your moving day we understand how important it is that you not only secure good value for money, but also be confident that the team arriving on the day will understand your requirements properly, having both the training and equipment necessary to ensure your move is seamless and stress free. Having worked in the UK domestic removals and storage market for over 30 years, Mark Ratcliffe Moving can satisfy all of these necessities. Working with customers throughout Reigate, across the South East and nationally, quality has always been at the heart of everything we do. We have a well respected reputation within the industry and our removal firm are one of just a handful with a dedicated staff training centre. All of our staff are trained to the highest industry standards in packing fragile and non-fragile personal effects, wrapping and moving household furniture for home and overseas moving, as well as customer services and vehicle loading. You are guaranteed the highest standards, competitive prices and a genuine commitment from everyone involved in your move when choosing Mark Ratcliffe Moving.

raw_body:
EMAIL US

Premier Removals Reigate and Surrey

At Mark Ratcliffe Moving we offer a complete moving and storage service. Having worked in the industry for more than 30 years, you can put your trust in us to look after your move.

How can we help you today?

Moving Home in Reigate? Let us make your journey as 'Smooth as Silk'

Welcome to Mark Ratcliffe Moving - A moving company you can trust

When choosing a removal firm for your moving day we understand how important it is that you not only secure good value for money, but also be confident that the team arriving on the day will understand your requirements properly, having both the training and equipment necessary to ensure your move is seamless and stress free. Having worked in the UK domestic removals and storage market for over 30 years, Mark Ratcliffe Moving can satisfy all of these necessities. Working with customers throughout Reigate, across the South East and nationally, quality has always been at the heart of everything we do. We have a well respected reputation within the industry and our removal firm are one of just a handful with a dedicated staff training centre. All of our staff are trained to the highest industry standards in packing fragile and non-fragile personal effects, wrapping and moving household furniture for home and overseas moving, as well as customer services and vehicle loading. You are guaranteed the highest standards, competitive prices and a genuine commitment from everyone involved in your move when choosing Mark Ratcliffe Moving.

Our service is fully comprehensive, handling your move from start to finish. From moving single items like 3 piece suites across Reigate, to moving entire 4 bed households up to Scotland, we are well equipped with the latest equipment, knowledgeable staff and necessary skill to handle your move with ease.

Our Service

Following your initial enquiry, Mark Ratcliffe will visit your home (at a time convenient for you) and carry out a site survey. During this time we can discuss all aspects of your forthcoming move including any packing requirements or insurance cover for your valuable possessions. A fixed quotation can be provided for moving, packing and storage and we also offer a house clearance service that we can provide further information on. On your moving day a fully trained and uniformed crew will arrive and lay down floor covers to protect your carpets, cover exposed doors and banisters etc. If required, they will also pack and move your belongings with the utmost care and transport them safely to your new home in Reigate or further afield.

Professional Packing Service Reigate

As part of our complete moving service, we offer a full packing service which includes a full packing option and fragile item packing. If you decide to carry out your own packing, we can provide flat pack moving boxes, plain paper, bubble wrap, tape etc. All products are minimal in cost and they can be collected from our shop located in Eastbourne, 7 days a week. 

Safe and Secure Storage   

Our secure self storage rooms are available to rent for customers who prefer to deposit / remove their own goods to / from store. The self storage rooms are available in various sizes with our most popular size being 77 sqft which equates to 850 cubic feet / 24 cubic metres. We rent this size room at £30 plus vat (per week) and with our storage rooms being much higher than local competitors and prices being over 50% less, you receive great value for money. Please feel free to call in at any time to view our rooms and to see first-hand that your possessions will be stored in a secure, damp free and clean environment. There is also great access for loading / unloading and you are the only key holder. 

Whether you are moving within Reigate or further afield in the UK, or even abroad, Mark Ratcliffe Moving is ready to help. We can satisfy all of your wider moving needs including secure storage, house clearance and export packing. Our friendly team would be delighted to give you a quote without any obligation. Please call Sharon Harris on 01323 848 008 to talk through your moving requirements. Our opening hours are Mon - Sat 08.30 - 17.00 or we can arrange an appointment for any other time including Sundays. A 24/7 Service for our Self Store Customers is also available.
